metadata.title: Sylvaur — Premium Home Textiles & Fashion Accessories | OEM/ODM Supplier
metadata.description: Professional sourcing partner for premium throw pillows and fashion scarves, based in China's textile hub. Low MOQ, OEM/ODM service, reliable export to Southeast Asia, Europe, and beyond.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about our textile sourcing team, supply chain, and 15+ years export experience from China's textile hub.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch for quotes or product inquiries. WhatsApp and email support — we reply within 24 hours.

products.title: Our Products
products.description: Browse our range of throw pillows and fashion scarves for global B2B buyers.

pillows.title: Throw Pillows
pillows.description: Premium decorative throw pillows for home and hospitality. Custom sizes and materials available.

scarves.title: Fashion Scarves
scarves.description: Elegant silk and cotton-blend scarves. OEM designs, low MOQ, worldwide export.

certifications.title: Certifications & Quality Standards
certifications.description: ISO 9001, OEKO-TEX, CE certified textiles. Third-party SGS tested.

home.heroTitle: Sylvaur — Premium Home Textiles & Fashion Accessories
home.heroSubtitle: Quality Home Textiles & Fashion Accessories — Direct from China's Textile Hub, Serving Buyers Worldwide

categories.pillowsDesc: Premium decorative throw pillows, cushions, and home textiles. Made with high-quality materials and modern designs at competitive prices.
categories.scarvesDesc: Elegant silk scarves, wraps, and fashion accessories. Low MOQ, custom designs available for global buyers.

home.featuredSubtitle: Our most popular items trusted by buyers worldwide

trustItems.title: Guangzhou Supply Chain
trustItems.desc: Located in the heart of China's textile hub with direct access to premium materials and skilled craftsmanship.

trustItems.title: Sourcing & Quality Control
trustItems.desc: Rigorous factory screening, pre-shipment inspection, and full customization support through our verified partner factories.

trustItems.title: Quality Assured
trustItems.desc: OEKO-TEX and ISO certified. Strict quality control throughout every production stage.

trustItems.title: Reliable Export
trustItems.desc: FOB Guangzhou. Fast and reliable shipping worldwide, with LCL service to Southeast Asia in 8-17 days.

home.ctaBottomDesc: Contact us today for a free quote. We respond within 24 hours.

products.title: Our Products
products.negotiable: All specifications are negotiable — contact us to discuss your requirements.

categoryDesc.pillows: Premium decorative throw pillows for home and hospitality. Custom sizes, materials, colors, and patterns available.
categoryDesc.scarves: Elegant fashion scarves and wraps in silk, cotton, and blends. OEM/ODM designs with low MOQ.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Textile Partner
about.intro: Based in the heart of China's textile hub, we specialize in high-quality home textiles and fashion accessories for global B2B buyers. With strong local supply chain networks and professional sourcing & QC teams, we deliver reliable, cost-effective solutions.
about.factoryDesc: Long-term partners with 10+ audited factories in the textile district. Annual capacity exceeds 2 million pieces with flexible production to meet your demands.

source.title: Source
source.desc: We scout and vet the best factories for your needs.

inspect.title: Inspect
inspect.desc: On-site quality checks before every shipment.

ship.title: Ship
ship.desc: Reliable FOB logistics to your destination port.

support.title: Support
support.desc: Dedicated communication — we reply within hours.

about.teamDesc: Experienced sourcing team with in-depth local knowledge, ensuring strict quality control from material selection to final shipment.

certifications.title: Certifications & Quality Standards
certifications.subtitle: Our commitment to quality and compliance
certifications.ctaText: Need specific certification documentation? We can provide certificates upon request.

items.name: ISO 9001:2015
items.desc: Quality management system certification ensuring consistent product quality and customer satisfaction.

items.name: OEKO-TEX Standard 100
items.desc: Certified free from harmful substances. Essential for European market access.

items.name: CE Marking
items.desc: Compliance with EU health, safety, and environmental requirements.

items.name: SGS Testing
items.desc: Third-party quality verification and product testing reports available.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll reply within 24 hours.

form.name: Your Name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

contact.responseTime: We typically respond within 1-2 business hours.

footer.companyDesc: Professional sourcing partner specializing in home textiles and fashion accessories. We connect global buyers with premium factories while handling QC, logistics, and communication — so you can focus on your business.
